tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: The eight thinking-failure problems ContextOverflow covers, phrased the way a human experiences them. Start here to see what exists.

tools.name: classify_intent
tools.description: Describe what's going wrong — your human's complaint, or a failure you notice in your own behavior — and get the matching techniques. Deterministic matching; if the description fits two problems it returns one clarifying question instead of guessing.

tools.name: find_technique
tools.description: Direct lookup by technique id or name, for when you already know what you want. To match by symptom, use classify_intent instead.

tools.name: get_technique
tools.description: A technique's mechanism, agent instructions, narration template, verification, and failure modes — the agent-tailored slice. The full human page is linked, not inlined.

tools.name: apply_technique
tools.description: The minimal executable scaffold: steps (or self-diagnostic for anti-patterns), the narration line to say to your human, and the verification check that proves it worked.
